deepseek-r1-distill-llama-8b.text: Okay, so I'm trying to figure out the diagnosis for this 71-year-old woman.

Complement levels were low, which makes me think of alternative pathways of complement activation, like in hemolytic anemia due to other causes.
She also had a low titer of cold agglutinins, which is another clue.

Flow cytometry didn't show any clonal populations, so no CLL or other clonal disorders.

Her lab work shows normocytic anemia (since MCV is around 106 fl, which is within normal range), reticulocytosis, and elevated LDH, which suggests hemolysis.
High bilirubin and low haptoglobin support this.
